text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we brood over lyrics for the Grand<n>Concert
song, someone floats the<n>idea of having a
call-and-response<n>section.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing this, Light Hello suddenly<n>realizes why the
runners who first<n>created the Grand Concert
chose<n>song as a medium.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans will never be able to run with<n>their favorite
Umamusume, but<n>nothing's stopping them from
singing<n>together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, I mull over an idea<n>someone
brought up during our<n>discussion that really stuck
with me.
choice_data_list:
"Gratitude towards the fans, without whom I
would not be running"...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When <chrname> sings at<n>the Grand
Concert, I wonder what<n>emotions she'll put into
her lyrics. I<n>can't wait to see.
